glosses.en: primary school teacher; elementary school teacher
glosses.es: maestro de primaria; maestro de escuela
glosses.it: maestro elementare; insegnante di scuola primaria
glosses.zh-Hans: 小学教师; 小学老师
glosses.yue: 小學老師; 小學教師
glosses.ru: учитель начальной школы; учитель начальных классов
glosses.pt: professor do ensino fundamental; professor do ensino primário
glosses.vi: giáo viên tiểu học; thầy giáo tiểu học
glosses.ar: معلّم ابتدائي; معلّم في المرحلة الابتدائية
glosses.uk: вчитель початкової школи; вчитель молодших класів
glosses.hu: általános iskolai tanító; elemi iskolai tanító
glosses.hi: प्राथमिक विद्यालय का शिक्षक; प्राथमिक शिक्षक
glosses.cs: učitel prvního stupně; učitel na základní škole
glosses.ja: 小学校教員; 小学校の先生

translations.en: The teacher always arrives before us.
translations.es: El maestro siempre llega antes que nosotros.
translations.de: Der Lehrer kommt immer vor uns an.
translations.it: Il maestro arriva sempre prima di noi.
translations.yue: 老師成日都比我哋早到。
translations.pt: O professor sempre chega antes de nós.
translations.tr: Öğretmen her zaman bizden önce gelir.
translations.vi: Thầy giáo luôn đến trước chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De leraar komt altijd eerder dan wij.
translations.uk: Учитель завжди приходить раніше за нас.
translations.hu: A tanító mindig előbb érkezik, mint mi.
translations.hi: अध्यापक हमेशा हमसे पहले आता है.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλος φτάνει πάντα πριν από εμάς.
translations.id: Guru selalu datang lebih dulu daripada kami.
translations.cs: Učitel vždy přijde dříve než my.
translations.ja: 先生はいつも私たちより先に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Masculine singular noun meaning primary-school teacher; preceded by elided definite article l' (lemma: le); functions as the subject.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb agreeing with the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a complement expressing anteriority.
1st person plural stressed pronoun serving as the object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: Je parle avec un instituteur sympa.

translations.fr: Je parle avec un instituteur sympa.
translations.en: I'm talking with a nice teacher.
translations.es: Estoy hablando con un maestro simpático.
translations.de: Ich spreche mit einem netten Lehrer.
translations.it: Sto parlando con un maestro simpatico.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在和一位和蔼的老师说话。
translations.yue: 我喺同一位友善嘅老師傾偈。
translations.pt: Estou conversando com um professor simpático.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nói chuyện với một thầy giáo dễ mến.
translations.nl: Ik praat met een aardige leraar.
translations.hi: मैं एक अच्छे अध्यापक से बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med en hyggelig lærer.
translations.id: Saya sedang berbicara dengan seorang guru yang ramah.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med en trevlig lärare.
translations.da: Jeg taler med en venlig lærer.
translations.ja: 優しい先生と話しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb of the clause.
Preposition introducing a complement of company.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'instituteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'avec' (with article 'un').
Informal adjective meaning 'nice'; attributive modifier of 'instituteur' (masculine singular form).

sentences.target: Cet instituteur nous connaît depuis longtemps.

translations.fr: Cet instituteur nous connaît depuis longtemps.
translations.en: This teacher has known us for a long time.
translations.es: Este maestro nos conoce desde hace mucho tiempo.
translations.de: Dieser Lehrer kennt uns schon seit langem.
translations.it: Questo maestro ci conosce da molto tempo.
translations.ko: 이 선생님은 우리를 오래전부터 알고 계세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位老师认识我们很久了。
translations.yue: 呢位老師識我哋好耐喇。
translations.ru: Этот учитель знает нас уже давно.
translations.pt: Este professor nos conhece há muito tempo.
translations.he: המורה הזה מכיר אותנו כבר הרבה זמן.
translations.tr: Bu öğretmen bizi uzun zamandır tanıyor.
translations.vi: Thầy giáo này biết chúng tôi từ lâu.
translations.ar: هذا المعلم يعرفنا منذ وقت طويل.
translations.nl: Deze leraar kent ons al heel lang.
translations.uk: Цей учитель знає нас уже давно.
translations.hu: Ez a tanító már régóta ismer minket.
translations.hi: यह अध्यापक हमें बहुत समय से जानता है.
translations.pl: Ten nauczyciel zna nas od dawna.
translations.el: Αυτός ο δάσκαλος μας γνωρίζει εδώ και πολύ καιρό.
translations.nb: Denne læreren har kjent oss i lang tid.
translations.id: Guru ini sudah lama mengenal kami.
translations.sv: Den här läraren har känt oss länge.
translations.ro: Acest învățător ne cunoaște de mult timp.
translations.cs: Ten učitel nás zná už dlouho.
translations.da: Denne lærer har kendt os i lang tid.
translations.fi: Tämä opettaja on tuntenut meidät jo pitkään.
translations.ja: この先生は私たちのことを昔から知っています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'instituteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb.
1st person plural clitic object pronoun placed before the verb; direct object of 'connaît'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking 'nous' as object.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Temporal adverb complementing 'depuis'.

translations.en: You're looking for a substitute teacher.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们正在寻找一位代课老师。
translations.yue: 你哋喺搵一位代課老師。
translations.pt: Vocês estão procurando um professor substituto.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang tìm một giáo viên thay thế.
translations.hi: आप एक स्थानापन्न अध्यापक की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: あなたたちは代わりの先生を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural (or formal singular) subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person plural; main verb of the clause.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'instituteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherchez'.
Attributive adjective (from the present participle of 'remplacer') modifying 'instituteur'; masculine singular agreement.
